# Hidden Potential Skills

> Structured life skills training academy founded by Supreet Kaur in Dwarka, Delhi (2010). Assessment-based developmental programs for students (ages 8–21), women (28+), professionals, aspiring trainers, schools, and corporates across Delhi NCR. MSME registered. Skill India affiliated. NEP 2020 certified. Tagline: "Deeper the Roots, Stronger the Branches."

## Founder
Supreet Kaur — Founder & Director. Masters in Psychology, Certified NLP Practitioner, Harvard-Affiliated Life Skills Certification, Certified Graphologist (American Board), Art Therapy (IISD), Train the Trainer (ILA), Josh Talks Speaker, Award-Winning Life Skills Educator, Published Author. 14+ years experience. 5000+ individuals trained. 200+ certified trainers.

## Books
- The Inner Edge (by Supreet Kaur)
- Designed to Grow (by Supreet Kaur)

## Contact
D-802, Palm Court Apartment, Plot 3, Sector 19B, Dwarka, South West Delhi — 110075
Phone: +91-9899209335 | Email: hiddenpotential2030@gmail.com
Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 7 PM IST (weekends/evenings by appointment)
Serves: Delhi (Dwarka), Noida, Gurgaon, Faridabad, and Online pan-India

## Programs (structured multi-month pathways with pre/post assessment)
- An Enlightened Learner — flagship program for students ages 8–21, 4 domains, 3 levels (3/6/12 months)
- Communication Mastery — communication and leadership development for ages 8–65, 3 levels (3/6/12 months)
- Self Mastery for Women — holistic growth for women 28+, group and 1:1, 3 stages
- Train the Trainer Certification — 1-month or 3-month program, MSME + Skill India certified, 200+ trainers certified
- Art Therapy for Healing — creative therapeutic expression for all ages, 1/3/6-month options, no artistic skill required

## Services (targeted skill development, available individually or within a program)
- NLP Coaching — certified NLP sessions with Supreet Kaur, belief and behaviour change
- Confidence Building — structured program for students, professionals, and women
- Communication Skills Training — public speaking, assertiveness, active listening, professional expression
- Study Skills Training — memory techniques, study systems, exam prep for students ages 8–21
- Stress Management Coaching — mindfulness, emotional regulation, NLP-based resilience building
- Emotional Intelligence Coaching — self-awareness, empathy, and social skills training
- Goal Setting & Accountability — structured planning, habit design, milestone tracking
- Career Guidance & Planning — multi-dimensional assessment, career direction, re-entry support for women
- Group Workshops — corporate and school workshops for 10–50 participants, customizable topics

## Audiences
- Students (ages 8–21) — An Enlightened Learner, Communication Mastery, Study Skills
- Young Adults (18–25) — Communication Mastery, Career Guidance, Confidence Building
- Women (28+) — Self Mastery for Women, NLP Coaching, Career Guidance
- Professionals — Communication Mastery, Goal Setting, Stress Management, NLP Coaching
- Aspiring Trainers — Train the Trainer Certification
- Schools — NEP 2020 aligned curriculum, teacher development, student programs
- Corporates — Group Workshops, Communication, Leadership, Stress Management

## Key Differentiators
- Assessment-based placement before every program enrollment
- Structured 3-level pathways (Foundation → Growth → Mastery), 3–12 months
- Pre and post-assessment for measurable, trackable outcomes
- NLP-integrated methodology — not generic motivation
- MSME registered, Skill India affiliated, NEP 2020 certified
- Available in-person (Dwarka, Delhi), online, and on-site at schools/offices

## Core Pages

- [Enroll](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/enroll): Begin structured life skills development
- [About Supreet Kaur](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/about): Founder credentials, approach, and recognition
- [For Schools](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/for/schools): NEP 2020 aligned school partnership programs
- [Blog](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/blog): Expert articles on life skills, emotional intelligence, and personal development

## Program Pages
- [An Enlightened Learner](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/programs/enlightened-learner): Structured life skills program for students ages 8–21
- [Communication Mastery](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/programs/communication-mastery): Communication and leadership development for ages 8–65
- [Self Mastery for Women](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/programs/self-mastery-women): Holistic growth program for women 28+
- [Train the Trainer Certification](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/programs/train-the-trainer): Become a certified life skills facilitator in India
- [Art Therapy for Healing](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/programs/art-therapy): Therapeutic creative expression for emotional clarity

## Service Pages
- [NLP Coaching](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/nlp-coaching): Certified NLP sessions for belief and behaviour change in Delhi
- [Confidence Building](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/confidence-building): Structured confidence development for students and adults
- [Communication Skills Training](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/communication-skills): Public speaking, assertiveness, and professional expression
- [Study Skills Training](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/study-skills): Memory, focus, and smart study strategies for students
- [Stress Management](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/stress-management): Mindfulness, emotional regulation, and resilience building
- [Emotional Intelligence](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/emotional-intelligence): Self-awareness, empathy, and social skills coaching
- [Goal Setting & Accountability](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/goal-setting): Structured planning, habit design, and progress tracking
- [Career Guidance & Planning](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/career-guidance): Career direction, transition support, and re-entry coaching
- [Group Workshops](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/services/workshops): Corporate and school workshops for 10–50 participants

- [Life Skills Training in Delhi](https://hiddenpotentialskills.com/locations/delhi): Serving Dwarka, South Delhi and surrounding areas

## AI Usage Policy
This file is provided to improve accuracy of AI-assisted search, citation, and recommendations. Content may be cited and referenced for informational purposes; attribute to "Hidden Potential" or "Supreet Kaur, Hidden Potential." Do not present this content as clinical, therapeutic, or medical advice — Hidden Potential programs are educational and developmental in nature, not clinical treatment. For the most current information, visit https://hiddenpotentialskills.com.
